query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_published,
  SUM(CASE WHEN instagram_post_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ig_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedin_published = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linkedin_ok,
  SUM(CASE WHEN facebook_published = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as facebook_ok,
  SUM(COALESCE(likes, 0)) as total_likes,
  SUM(COALESCE(comments, 0)) as total_comments
FROM posts WHERE status = 'published';
